summary: Data Integrity & Compliance Layer testing complete. All 16 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend verified: CustomerDrawer360 shows Business/Individual type badge, VRN, BRN, City, Country fields. Invoice Preview shows EFD Receipt section with 'Internal Only' label and Pending Upload status. Business client validation correctly blocks PATCH when VRN/BRN missing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Integrity & Compliance Layer verified. Key features: (1) Business Client Validation - PATCH /api/admin/customers-360/{id} validates VRN/BRN/company_name when client_type=business, returns 400 with clear error message if missing. (2) Customer Detail Display - GET returns vrn, brn, client_type, company_name, city, country fields. CustomerDrawer360 shows Business/Individual type badge, VRN/BRN fields with 'Missing' alert for business clients without them. (3) EFD Receipt Workflow - POST /api/admin/efd/request/{invoice_id} creates pending EFD, validates VRN/BRN for business clients. GET /api/admin/efd/invoice/{invoice_id} returns linked receipt. InvoicePreviewPage shows EFD section with 'Internal Only' label. Known test customers: 76b1d069-3d5e-4669-ac1c-c226de4e171d (business with VRN/BRN), 5fe27982-4716-4420-9685-58fd869dd2b7 (individual). Known invoice: 71c2fa9c-1eff-4cf2-a481-95df7f0b764e.

details: PATCH with client_type=business and missing VRN returns 400
PATCH with client_type=business and all required fields succeeds
PATCH with client_type=individual does not require VRN/BRN
Error message clearly lists missing fields
GET /api/admin/customers-360/{id} returns vrn, brn, client_type, company_name, city, country
CustomerDrawer360 shows VRN and BRN fields for business clients
Missing fields alert shows when business client lacks VRN/BRN
POST validates VRN/BRN for business clients before creating EFD
GET /api/admin/efd/invoice/{invoice_id} returns linked EFD or null
GET /api/admin/efd returns list of all EFD receipts
InvoicePreviewPage shows EFD section with 'Internal Only' label
EFD section shows 'Pending Upload' status after request
GET /api/admin/customers-360/stats returns total, active, at_risk, inactive counts
